one_time_description: Recognition of asset retirement obligations under new PS 3280 standard, increasing liabilities by $2,212,220 and expenses by $317,087
economic_notes: George Gordon Developments Limited Partnership (GBE) earned $1,413,440 in 2022 calendar year. TLE Trust holdings and TLE Revenue Account active. Dakota Dunes Community Development Corporation relationship noted.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 so fiscal_year=2023. Province is Saskatchewan (Treaty 4 Territory, Raymore Credit Union). Auditor MNP LLP Saskatoon. New PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations standard adopted prospectively April 1, 2022 - material impact of $2,212,220 liability recognized. GBE (George Gordon Developments LP) accounted for by modified equity method with December 31 year-end. Note 13 contingent asset: claim against Government of Canada with loan taken to fund negotiations. ISC total calculated net of deferred revenue adjustments. Education expenses combined Education ($6,908,945) + Post Secondary ($1,819,801) = $8,728,746. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($24,931,117) + CMHC ($1,152,642) + TCFS Prevention ($513,127) + TLE Annual Income ($148,478) = $26,745,364 approx; used $27,236,001 including Touchwood Agency Tribal Council funding portion. osr estimated as total revenue minus government transfers.
